heading: Termination
label: 9624 Termination
notes: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “7 years after ”.Pub. L. 119–60December 31, 2031October 5, 2018
amendments: Amendments2025—Subsec. (a). substituted “” for “7 years after ”.Pub. L. 119–60December 31, 2031October 5, 2018

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The authorities provided under this subchapter terminate on .December 31, 2031

children.heading: Termination of Corporation
children.label: b Termination of Corporation
children.text: The Corporation shall terminate on the date on which the portfolio of the Corporation is liquidated.
